audit_scope: GitHub Actions pinger only — MacBook pinger is out of scope (local filesystem, not reachable from GitHub Actions). MacBook pinger coverage is delegated to the collector verifier which consolidates both sources.

levels.name: discoverability
levels.description: Can a cold-start agent find this component and understand what it does?

checks.description: Public registry responds with HTTP 200
Registry contains an entry with name = tools_list_latency_measurer
Component entry has a non-empty data_url field
component_contract.json is publicly accessible from the component repo

levels.name: component_completeness
levels.description: Is the component fully defined and operational?

checks.description: component_contract.json is valid JSON with required fields
GitHub Actions workflow benchmark.yml exists and has run at least once
verify.js is publicly accessible from the component repo

levels.name: output_availability
levels.description: Is the component running and producing output?

checks.description: At least one successful GitHub Actions run in the last 3 hours
The latest successful run produced at least one artifact
Latest artifact is valid JSON
File contains benchmark, date, server_label, results
benchmark field equals "tools/list"
results contains all 8 expected providers

levels.name: output_integrity_content
levels.description: Are all expected measurement fields present with valid values?

checks.description: jitter_ms is a number >= 0
Each result has url (non-empty string) and http_status (integer or null when ok=false)
Each result has ok as a boolean
Each result has mcpclient with hostname, platform, node_version all non-null
Each result has mcpclient.ipv4 non-null
Each result has mcpclient.geo with city, country_code, latitude, longitude all non-null
Each result has timestamps.mcpclient.request_start_ms and request_end_ms as numbers > 0
Each ok result has mcpserver with provider non-null
Each ok result has mcpserver.resolved_ip non-null
Each ok result has mcpserver.geo with city, country_code, latitude, longitude all non-null
Each ok result has timestamps.mcpserver.start_ms and end_ms as numbers > 0
Each ok result has tools as a non-empty array
